items.content: A vulnerability classified as critical has been found in sfturing hosp_order up to 627f426331da8086ce8fff2017d65b1ddef384f8. items.title: CVE-2025-6761 | Kingdee Cloud-Starry-Sky Enterprise Edition 6.x/7.x/8.x/9.0 Freemarker Engine DynamicForm 4 Action.class plugin.buildMobilePopHtml special elements used in a template engine (KDPSIRT-2025-00090)
